title: MLS encrypt silently falls back to plaintext on error
description: When mls_active is true but mls.encrypt() returns any error, commands.rs falls back to sending line_bytes.clone() (cleartext) with only a warn! log. Trigger: any MLS provider or ratchet error during send. Bad behavior: relay receives plaintext payload; user sees no indication; the architecture's core invariant ('server never sees plaintext message content') is violated silently. Occurs in at least 4 call sites: main chat text (~861), /me action (~710), /cat file send (~745), /! command output (~800). The correct behavior is to refuse the send with a user-visible error rather than degrade to cleartext.
